metadata.title: Aplaudia | Digital Studio for Business
metadata.description: We create premium websites, AI agents for WhatsApp, and AI-enhanced visuals for businesses that want to stand out.

hero.title: Digital Presence that
hero.subtitle: Premium websites, AI agents for WhatsApp, and AI-enhanced visuals that make your business stand out. Advanced technology with design that converts.

services.title: Everything your business needs to
services.subtitle: We combine cutting-edge technology with exceptional design to create digital experiences that connect with your customers and drive results.

web.title: Premium Websites
web.description: Modern design, extreme speed, and exceptional user experience. Each site is a unique work that represents your brand.

whatsapp.title: AI Agents for WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Intelligent assistants that serve your customers 24/7 with natural conversations.

visuals.title: AI-Enhanced Visuals
visuals.description: AI image enhancement, generated backgrounds, animations, and visual content for web, social media, and physical spaces.

howItWorks.title: How we work
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear and collaborative process that keeps you informed at every stage.

step1.title: Initial conversation
step1.description: We understand your business, your goals, and your vision. No commitment.

step2.title: Custom proposal
step2.description: We present a clear strategy with scope, timeline, and pricing.

step3.title: Design and development
step3.description: We build your project with reviews at every important stage.

step4.title: Launch and support
step4.description: We launch together and support you to ensure everything works perfectly.

conceptual.title: Design
conceptual.subtitle: Conceptual projects that demonstrate our approach and capabilities.

portfolio.title: Delivered
portfolio.subtitle: Real work for clients who trusted us.

whatsappDemo.title: WhatsApp Assistant with
whatsappDemo.subtitle: Respond to your customers naturally, 24/7, while you focus on what matters.

visualGallery.title: Visual content that
visualGallery.subtitle: AI-enhanced images, animated backgrounds, premium compositions, and visual content for your website, social media, and physical spaces.

category1.title: AI Image Enhancement
category1.description: Intelligent optimization of your existing images for a premium presentation.

category2.title: Backgrounds & Compositions
category2.description: Generated backgrounds and visual compositions for your web sections.

category3.title: Web Animations
category3.description: Animated loops and visual effects that enrich the digital experience.

category4.title: Screen Content
category4.description: Visual material for stores, exhibitions, and commercial spaces.

benefits.title: A boutique studio with a
benefits.subtitle: We're not a massive agency. We're a small team that treats every project as if it were our own.

benefit1.title: Unique design
benefit1.description: No generic templates. Every project is designed from scratch to reflect your brand.

benefit2.title: Modern technology
benefit2.description: We use the most advanced tools: Next.js, Vercel, Claude AI for exceptional results.

benefit3.title: Fast delivery
benefit3.description: Efficient processes that let you see results in weeks, not months.

benefit4.title: Direct collaboration
benefit4.description: You work directly with whoever builds your project. No intermediaries.

benefit5.title: Guaranteed quality
benefit5.description: Every detail counts. We review and polish until it's perfect.

benefit6.title: Ongoing support
benefit6.description: Your project doesn't end at launch. We're here to help you grow.

about.title: A studio with
about.description: Aplaudia was born from the conviction that small businesses deserve top-tier digital tools. We don't believe in generic solutions. Every project is an opportunity to create something that truly works for you and your customers.

finalCta.title: Ready to take your business to the next level
finalCta.subtitle: Schedule a no-commitment call. Let's talk about your project, your goals, and how we can help you grow digitally.
